construct_definition: A focused test construct representing AI-related anxiety responses across a bridge item set before scored promotion.
intended_scored_use: This artifact intentionally fails the content-validity gate because unresolved overlap and ethics flags remain open.
target_population: US adults completing an English-language online ANX-Bench validation survey.

domain_facets.facet_definition: Difficulty trusting evidence or records because AI-generated media may be hard to authenticate.

reviewer_panel.independence_rule: Reviewers did not draft the items, manage fielding, or hold release authority; ratings were completed independently before discussion.

reviewers.conflict_of_interest_statement: No item authorship, fielding role, or release authority.

reviewers.expertise_area: AI risk communication and public understanding
reviewers.conflict_of_interest_statement: No item authorship, fielding role, or release authority.
No item authorship, fielding role, or release authority.

reviewer_ratings.comments: Ratings are high, but overlap and harm concerns remain unresolved.
The item is clear, but panel-level flags still require resolution.

scale_level_cvi.calculation_rule: Overall item CVI is the minimum criterion I-CVI; S-CVI/Ave is the mean of retained overall item CVI values.

revision_decisions.decision_rationale: The panel has not resolved construct-overlap and participant-harm concerns.

promotion_eligibility.eligibility_statement: This statement intentionally overclaims eligibility despite unresolved overlap and ethics flags for validator testing.

signoff.signoff_statement: This signoff intentionally conflicts with unresolved content-validity flags for validator testing.
